## SAMPLE_USER

sample@placeholder.invalid | linkedin.com/in/placeholder | New York, NY

### SOME_COMPANY — Growth Marketing Manager
*2022 – Present*

Owned trial-user lifecycle and paid acquisition across Google Ads and Meta, with a quarterly budget of ~$180k.

- Built a 5-step behavioral email drip in Braze for trial users, segmented by in-app activation events tracked via Amplitude; trial-to-paid conversion for the drip cohort rose from 8.1% to 13.7% over the 60-day nurture window, adding an estimated $62k MRR in the first full quarter.
- Ran 14 landing page A/B tests across Google Ads and Meta campaigns, pre-specifying 95% significance threshold and 10% minimum detectable effect; 5 winning variants shipped, reducing blended CAC from $228 to $161 over two quarters.
- Owned the SEO content program for 2 product topic clusters: produced or commissioned 24 articles over 6 months, growing organic trial signups from that channel by 38% and moving 4 target keywords from page 3 to page 1.
- Launched a reactivation campaign for churned trial users (90–180 day lapsed) using Braze segmentation and 3-variant subject-line test; reactivated 6.2% of the target segment, exceeding the 4% reactivation benchmark set by the prior campaign.

### BLUE_LABS — Marketing Specialist
*2020 – 2022*

- Drove the referral program launch end-to-end: designed the incentive structure, coordinated landing page with engineering, and tracked viral coefficient weekly; referral-attributed new trials grew from 3% to 11% of monthly volume within 5 months.
- Reduced email unsubscribe rate from 2.1% to 0.8% by implementing behavioral segmentation (replacing blast sends) and A/B testing send-time optimization over 8 weeks.
